ab: ya mamu ramas, pasaring ta micuw sunbaba’ la kay.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.

ab: tatuli’ hang! pastukug ci tunux.
en: A: Please stand up! Salute!

ab: sinsi ya su ramas.
en: B: Hello.

ab: tatama’.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: ya mamu ramas. pasba’un mu cimu ci sasunno kumaṟal ka nani’un na ita Itaṟal soni.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的泰雅語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today, I am going to teach you how to say the Atayal language for food.

ab: ya mamu ba’un mung ka ke’ na sinsi’?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sinsi’ kaṟal tutux luṟi, ini mu ba’i’ mung.
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ka yaba’ hari’ ka ke’ su sinsi’, ini mu pungi’?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: galuw lunpuw kinang tutux, katox sani.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: ramas linpagan mamu.
en: Very well read.

ab: yaba’ haṟi’ ka ke’ mamu, lapagiy tutux luṟi.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: iya’ pakakaṟal, iceng haṟi.
en: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ab: agal ka patas mamu.
en: A: Please take out your textbook.

ab: ho’, sinsi.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: agal ci papatas mamu.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: ṟumungi’ cu maras ci papatas la sinsi.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: agal ka papuṟut mamu.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: ṟumungi’ cu maṟas ci papuṟut la sinsi.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: kacik ci ka babang hang.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: pakaciki’ cu ci papuṟut su aw?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: pa’alax ta sababa’an la.
en: Class is over.

ab: pakakatox ta babuw ni la, tehuk sani soni la kay.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
